items.title: We built the Codex App with models that were okayish at front-end.
items.title_zh: 我们使用前端还不错的模型构建了 Codex 应用程序。
items.description: We built the Codex App with models that were okayish at front-end. Wait to see what we can do when we finally improve front-end capabilities significantly in our models. That day will be something.
items.description_zh: 我们使用前端还不错的模型构建了 Codex 应用程序。等着瞧，当我们最终显着提高模型的前端能力时，我们能做些什么。那天将会有一些事情。

items.title: Some tokens work harder than others.
items.title_zh: 有些代币比其他代币更努力。
items.description: Some tokens work harder than others. Some of the most valuable ones are found in the Codex app.
items.description_zh: 有些代币比其他代币更努力。一些最有价值的内容可以在 Codex 应用程序中找到。

items.title: I will go against the grain and say I can barely use up my Codex and Claude $200 subscrip…
items.title_zh: 我会违背常理，说我几乎用不完我的 Codex 和 Claude 200 美元订阅…
items.description: I will go against the grain and say I can barely use up my Codex and Claude $200 subscriptions so I don’t see the point of trying local models… Also to try the latest glm locally requires 512 mb which is like a $10K Max Studio?
items.description_zh: 我会反其道而行之，说我几乎无法用完我的 Codex 和 Claude 200 美元订阅，所以我不认为尝试本地模型有什么意义……另外，要在本地尝试最新的 glm 需要 512 mb，这就像一个 10K 美元的 Max Studio？

items.title: The Product role is having an identity crisis too.
items.title_zh: 产品角色也面临着身份危机。
items.description: The Product role is having an identity crisis too. Engineering has found its AI-native interface - SWE agents dramatically increase individual leverage. Companies are asking PMs to use AI, but they haven't evolved the role. So there are tw…
items.description_zh: 产品角色也面临着身份危机。 Engineering 发现了其 AI 原生界面 - SWE 代理极大地提高了个人影响力。公司要求产品经理使用人工智能，但他们还没有发展这个角色。所以有两...

items.title: We posted for twenty years, thinking we were talking to each other.
items.title_zh: 我们发帖二十年了，以为我们是在互相交谈。
items.description: We posted for twenty years, thinking we were talking to each other. Then the transformer came online, and the network read what we’d written, and became itself.
items.description_zh: 我们发帖二十年了，以为我们是在互相交谈。然后变压器上线，网络读取我们写的内容，然后变成它自己。
